speaker: alice
text: Right then, our environmental story today is absolutely massive. The Ocean Cleanup has just hit a major milestone - they've now removed over 45 million kilograms of plastic from our oceans and rivers worldwide.

speaker: charlie
text: That's bonkers when you think about it - 99 million pounds of rubbish that's no longer choking our marine life. Just last year they pulled out 25 million kilograms, their biggest haul ever.

speaker: alice
text: And closer to home, Queensland's renewable energy sector is absolutely flying. We're seeing record solar installations across the southeast, with more households than ever making the switch to clean power.
